board memo: communications and compliance plan for northbridge holdings plc (lse: nbhp)
scope: uk mar, fca disclosure guidance and transparency rules, listing rules; employment and market-abuse workflows
status: all facts below derive from public sources (rns dated 03 mar 2024, published annual report 2025, website statements), and previously closed projects
public reference: rns number 0000n1234 noting completion of project meadow integration and published non-deal roadshow slides
ir draft for interim results: embargo until 07:00 bst on 02 sep 2026; draft housed in sharepoint folder ref nb-ir-2026-02
no amounts, forecasts, or guidance are included in the draft; wording aligns with prior rns and avoids selective disclosure
deal checklist (legacy): greenline services ltd acquisition closed in 2024 and is fully announced; no live offer or inside information is being circulated
documentation uses standard negated mac language: no material adverse change since the last audited balance sheet date, as already stated in the circular
project-management notes: spa-day for staff wellbeing scheduled next quarter; unrelated to markets, not a transaction, avoid over-reading
pdmr notification template retained for training; do not submit forms without an actual triggering event; placeholders include invalid isin gb00x0000007 and lei 213800abcdef000xyz12
role mailboxes for queries: ir@northbridgeholdings.co.uk and compliance@northbridgeholdings.co.uk; do not use personal emails
research team notes cite public fca speeches and the cma fintech market study; any price commentary references published broker notes only
governance: if a definitive agreement were to be signed in future, notify company secretary and consider mar inside information assessment before drafting rns
reminder: this memo intentionally excludes non-public amounts and percentages; if your content contains such details, route to legal for pre-clearance
